listitem.para: * endo = a string, the name of the endogenous variable
* bounds = the bounds over which to perform the simulation

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Provides a dynamic forecast from an equation estimated by ols(), hwhite(), olst(), lad(),.... The name of the lhs (the field 'namey' in the result tlist saved in the process of estimation) must begin with the name of the endogenous variable or by one or several functions applied successively among the functions delts, growthr or one of the functions defined in the database GROCERDIR+'/macros/db/define_func.dat', applied to the endogenous variable. All data must exist in the working environment.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
